use_cases: Displaying sleep quality metrics and duration in health tracking mobile apps
Showing animated sleep stage breakdowns in wellness dashboards
Presenting overnight sleep analysis with visual bar graph in health portals
Visualizing sleep data trends over time in fitness and health wearables
Providing at-a-glance sleep insights with color-coded stage identification
ai_summary: A sleep tracking card component that displays sleep quality metrics and an animated bar graph showing different sleep stages (Awake, REM, Core, Deep) with color-coded segments. Features Framer Motion entrance animations with staggered spring effects on each bar. Designed for health and wellness applications, presenting time slept, quality percentage, and stage durations in a clean card layout suitable for both mobile and desktop platforms.
